sizing_rule.note: Position Size = Account Equity / (Risk Per Trade / Optimal f). Example: 50,000 / (5,000 / 0.1) = 1 unit. Demonstrates reinvestment of profits for cumulative equity growth (Ralph Vince methodology).

source_rule_text: Position size is calculated by dividing total account equity by the risk per trade divided by the optimal f value, demonstrating how reinvestment of profits affects cumulative equity growth versus non-reinvestment scenarios.
